text:
### 4. Four non-recursive directory scans would silently go blank
`enforce_bidirectional_links` (`wiki.rs:367`), `rebuild_index` (`wiki.rs:506`), `read_index_live` (`wiki.rs:673`), and the statusline (`statusline.rs:390`) all do a flat `read_dir`. Under a foldered layout each sees **zero** guides until converted to a recursive walk. Miss one and you get a half-built index or broken backlink enforcement, with no error. [...] ### 5. Concurrency gets a new race class
Peers run capture concurrently (your memory even notes multi-agent hazards on this repo). A flat layout gives each slug one stable path. Renames racing with a concurrent read/write of the same slug is a failure mode the flat layout simply doesn't have.
